segments.short_description: Browsers built or adapted specifically for AI agent use, including headless variants optimised for programmatic navigation.

segments.short_description: Human labeling, RLHF, and feedback-collection platforms for agent training data.

segments.name: Automation
segments.short_description: General-purpose automation tools and frameworks, including GUI-driven and script-driven flows.

segments.short_description: Tools that let agents query backend systems, databases and APIs.

segments.short_description: Systems that steer or constrain multi-turn conversations with agents.

segments.name: Data Extraction and Structuring
segments.short_description: Tools that convert unstructured data into structured form for agents to consume.

segments.short_description: Curated data feeds and providers that agents can draw on.

segments.short_description: Models used to produce embeddings for retrieval and RAG pipelines.

segments.name: Embedding Pipeline Orchestrators
segments.short_description: Orchestration tools that manage embedding generation and ingestion pipelines.

segments.short_description: Platforms targeted at engineering teams building with LLMs and agents.

segments.short_description: Tools that shape feedback signals (tool output, user input) into forms agents can act on.

segments.name: Formatting

children.short_description: Agents and frameworks that operate a computer the way a human would (mouse, keyboard, screen).

segments.short_description: General-purpose frameworks for building agents and agentic applications.

segments.name: Frontends
segments.short_description: User-facing interfaces — web, desktop, mobile, terminal — for interacting with agents.

segments.short_description: Gateway services that sit between agents and upstream services (LLMs, tools, data).

segments.short_description: Simulations focused specifically on geopolitical scenarios and dynamics.

segments.name: Harnesses

children.name: Checkpointing
children.short_description: Save and restore agent execution state across interruptions, crashes, or session boundaries.

children.name: Context Compression
children.short_description: Harness-level summarisation and pruning that rolls the context window during a run, distinct from gateway-level compression in the request path.

children.name: Deep Research
children.short_description: Harnesses for multi-step research workflows with planning, tool use, and synthesis.

children.name: Platform Specific
macOS
children.short_description: Harnesses that run agents natively on macOS.
Harnesses that target a specific host OS or environment for native integration.

children.name: Retry and Recovery
children.short_description: Failure handling, automatic rerun on tool errors, and partial-result recovery for agent loops.

children.name: Sub-agent Dispatch
children.short_description: Libraries and runtimes that spawn isolated sub-agent contexts to offload work and preserve main-thread coherence.

children.name: Task Coherence
children.short_description: Progress trackers, self-reflection loops, and plan-revision utilities that keep long-running agent tasks on course.

segments.short_description: Execution-layer scaffolding that wraps agents for real runs — sub-agent dispatch, long-horizon coherence, checkpointing, platform-specific runtimes.
segments.long_description: Harnesses sit between frameworks (which define agent shape) and runtimes (which provide the sandbox). They're the execution-layer utilities that make long-running, multi-step agent runs actually work in practice: spawning isolated sub-agent contexts, resuming from checkpoints, recovering from tool failures, keeping the main thread coherent over time, and adapting to the host platform.

segments.name: Identity and Auth
segments.short_description: Agent identity, credential vaulting, and delegated authentication for tool access.

segments.name: Inference Servers
segments.short_description: LLM inference servers and runtimes (vLLM, TGI, llama.cpp, SGLang) that agents call into.

segments.name: Integrations
segments.short_description: Agent-to-SaaS connector platforms: Composio-style libraries exposing third-party APIs as agent tools.

segments.name: LLMs

children.short_description: Agents and frameworks that operate a computer the way a human would (mouse, keyboard, screen).

segments.short_description: Agent loop implementations — the core think/act/observe cycle.

segments.name: Marketplaces
segments.short_description: Marketplaces and stores for discovering, listing, or transacting agents and agent-based services.

segments.name: SaaS Builders

children.name: Code-Defined
children.short_description: Hosted builders where agents and workflows are primarily defined in code (SDK, DSL, or config-as-code).

children.name: No Code
children.short_description: Builders targeted at non-programmers, typically form- and config-driven with minimal visual wiring.

children.name: Visual Programming
Workflow Focused
children.short_description: Visual builders oriented around structured, multi-step workflows rather than free-form agents.
Builders where flows are expressed as node-and-edge graphs or canvas-based visual programs.

segments.short_description: Hosted SaaS platforms for building agents and agentic workflows, spanning no-code, visual, and code-defined paradigms.

segments.short_description: Cache layers that serve semantically equivalent LLM responses to cut cost and latency.

segments.name: Standards

children.name: Emerging (Ecosystem-Tied)
children.short_description: Emerging standards whose adoption is tied to a specific host ecosystem (e.g. a browser engine or platform vendor) rather than being fully vendor-neutral.

children.name: Ratified
children.short_description: Standards with a published specification and active governance.

segments.short_description: Proposed and emerging standards across the agentic ecosystem.

segments.short_description: Opinionated starter kits and templates for kicking off agentic projects.

segments.short_description: Libraries that constrain LLM outputs to typed schemas, JSON, or formal grammars.

segments.short_description: Tools that synthesise multiple viewpoints or agent outputs into a unified perspective.

segments.short_description: Holding area for projects awaiting classification. Entries here are a todo list, not a destination.
